product_queue.target_audience: New Etsy sellers who want to calculate true profit after all fees
product_queue.rationale: Meta-niche: selling tools TO Etsy sellers. High intent buyers. Specific pain point (Etsy fees are confusing).

product_queue.niche: Freelancer Invoice Tracker with Tax Estimation
product_queue.target_audience: Freelancers and solopreneurs who need to track invoices and estimate quarterly taxes
product_queue.rationale: Evergreen need. Tax season drives searches. Specific value: auto-calculates estimated tax.

product_queue.niche: Wedding Budget Tracker with Vendor Payment Schedule
product_queue.target_audience: Engaged couples planning wedding on a budget
product_queue.rationale: High-emotion purchase. Etsy is THE platform for wedding planning. Vendor payment schedule is unique angle.

product_queue.niche: Small Business Inventory Tracker with Reorder Alerts
product_queue.target_audience: Small business owners and Etsy sellers who need simple inventory management
product_queue.rationale: Practical business tool. Conditional formatting for reorder alerts adds genuine utility.

product_queue.niche: Subscription Tracker with Annual Cost Projection
product_queue.target_audience: People who want to track and reduce monthly subscription spending
product_queue.rationale: Trending niche (subscription fatigue). Visual dashboard showing annual burn rate.

product_queue.niche: Debt Payoff Calculator Snowball & Avalanche Method
product_queue.target_audience: People with multiple debts who want a clear payoff plan
product_queue.rationale: Both methods compared side-by-side. Calculates exact payoff date. High emotional value.

product_queue.target_audience: YouTubers, TikTokers, and streamers tracking income across multiple platforms
product_queue.rationale: Growing audience of creators. No single tool tracks all platforms. Dashboard with monthly comparison.

product_queue.niche: Meal Prep Planner with Grocery List Generator
product_queue.target_audience: Busy professionals who meal prep weekly
product_queue.rationale: Practical daily use. Auto-generates grocery list from selected recipes. Calculates calories/macros.
Landlords need simple tracking for tax time. Multi-property tabs. Cash flow summary.

product_queue.target_audience: Pet owners who want to track vet visits, medications, food costs
product_queue.rationale: Pet niche is emotional + underserved on Etsy for spreadsheets. Medication reminders + cost tracking.
